rules.label: Trial period (provanställning)
rules.summary: Trial employment may not exceed 6 months. After that, the employment converts to indefinite (tillsvidareanställning) unless explicitly terminated.

rules.label: Notice period (uppsägningstid)
rules.summary: Minimum statutory notice period scales with length of service: 1 month under 2 years, up to 6 months at 10+ years. Cannot be reduced below this floor by contract.

rules.label: Damages for invalid termination
rules.summary: An employer who terminates without saklig grund (just cause) is liable for general damages and lost wages, regardless of any waiver in the contract.

rules.label: Maximum working hours
rules.summary: Regular working time is at most 40 hours per week. Overtime is capped at 200 hours per year. Mandatory daily rest of 11 consecutive hours.
